results.rendered_html:
apa-√kram to go away, retreat, retire from,  RV. x, 164, 1  &c.;
to glide away;
to measure off by steps,  Kauś.  :
Caus. -kramayati, to cause to run away,  PBr.  :
Desid. -cikramiṣati, to intend to run away or escape (with abl.),  ŚBr.

results.rendered_html:
apakram 1 P.
1 To go away, run away, fly, escape, flee away, leave, retreat, retire (from); nagarādapakrāṃtaḥ  Mu. 1 ; rākṣaso'pakrāmannupekṣitaḥ
3 while escaping.
2 To glide away, pass away, (as time).
3 To measure off by steps or by pacing.
